parameters.query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.email, p.full_name, p.currency
FROM auth.users u
JOIN public.profiles p ON p.id = u.id
WHERE u.email IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  transaction_type,
  SUM(amount) as total,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM public.transactions
WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
  AND transaction_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND transaction_date < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY transaction_type

SELECT
  COALESCE(category, 'Uncategorized') as category,
  SUM(amount) as total,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM public.transactions
WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
  AND transaction_type = 'expense'
  AND transaction_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND transaction_date < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  b.category,
  b.amount as budget,
  COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) as spent,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) / b.amount * 100, 1) as pct
FROM public.budgets b
LEFT JOIN public.transactions t ON
  t.user_id = b.user_id
  AND t.category = b.category
  AND t.transaction_type = 'expense'
  AND date_trunc('month', t.transaction_date) = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
WHERE b.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
  AND b.month = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date
GROUP BY b.category, b.amount
HAVING COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) / b.amount >= 0.8
ORDER BY pct DESC
